component.name: Cosmic Camera
component.summary: Wayland-native camera, photo, and video capture for COSMIC

description.p: Cosmic Camera is a distro-agnostic, Wayland-native camera app for COSMIC, System76's Rust desktop. COSMIC does not ship a default camera app, and most third-party options are deprecated, unmaintained, or do not work properly on Wayland.

Cosmic Camera takes the correct Wayland-native approach — capturing through the camera portal and PipeWire — with an automatic fallback to direct V4L2 access if the portal misbehaves, so it stays usable even on immature portal implementations.

ul.li: Photo capture (JPEG) to your Pictures folder
Video recording (VP8/WebM, royalty-free) to your Videos folder
Portal-first capture with an automatic direct-V4L2 fallback
Packaged as a Flatpak that runs anywhere Flatpak runs

description.p: Added a settings drawer for camera and resolution/framerate selection. Photos are captured at the selected full resolution while the preview is downscaled for smoothness, and the portal path now times out and falls back to V4L2 so the app starts even where no camera portal is available.
First working release: live preview, JPEG photo capture, and VP8/WebM video recording, with portal-first capture and a direct-V4L2 fallback.
